args: export DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://localhost:5432/cortex}"; export CORTEX_RUNTIME="${CORTEX_RUNTIME:-cli}"; export PYTHONPATH="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}:${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/deps"; mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/deps"; python3 -c 'import psycopg' 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install -q --target "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/deps" "psycopg[binary]>=3.1" "pgvector>=0.3" 2>/dev/null; cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}" && exec python3 -m mcp_server
